chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1812 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 18.11.2016. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith ASI Ratan Sindh P.S Kaloi. Private respondents are also present in person. -.-.-. Today, private respondents are also present, who have been forewarned that they will not cause any harassment to the petitioner No.2 Muhammad Azam and if they have any grievance they can avail remedy through due process of law. Today, petitioner No.1 is present alongwith her daughter baby Nazia and she wants to go alongwith her parents, who are also present in Court, namely Deen Muhammad and Mst. Sakina (father and mother of petitioner No.1). Petitioner No.1 Mst. Zainab being sui juris has every right to reside with her parents and whenever she wants to meet her husband, the petitioner No.2, the parents of petitioner No.1 will not create any unnecessary obstacles so that matrimonial relationship between the parties are not spoiled. Similarly, petitioner No.2 Muhammad Azam is also directed not to cause any harassment to petitioner No.1 or her parents. Considering the peculiar circumstances and sensitivity of matter today, ASI Ratan Singh of P.S Kaloi undertakes to provide protection to petitioner No.1 Mst. Zainab and her parents and he will accompany them to their place of destination at Badin, whereas, both petitioners as well as parents of petitioner No.1 and private respondents are directed to furnish personal bond with the Additional Registrar of this Court with regard to their undertaking and good behavior.

Considering the peculiar circumstances and sensitivity of matter today, ASI Ratan Singh of P.S Kaloi undertakes to provide protection to petitioner No.1 Mst. Zainab and her parents and he will accompany them to their place of destination at Badin, whereas, both petitioners as well as parents of petitioner No.1 and private respondents are directed to furnish personal bond with the Additional Registrar of this Court with regard to their undertaking and good behavior. In this regard, learned A.A.G present today will also take appropriate measures that life and liberty of Mst. Zainab and her minor baby Nazia are protected. With these observations and directions instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE
